name: MACH NATURAL RESOURCES LP
business: The company is an independent upstream oil and gas company focused on the acquisition, development and production of oil, natural gas and NGL reserves in the Anadarko Basin, San Juan Basin, and Permian Basin. It also owns midstream assets including gathering systems, processing plants and water infrastructure that generate third-party revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are an independent upstream oil and gas company focused on the acquisition, development and production of oil, natural gas and NGL reserves in the Anadarko Basin region of Western Oklahoma, Southern Kansas and the panhandle of Texas; the San Juan Basin region of New Mexico and Colorado; and the Permian Basin region of West Texas, and we operate approximately 12,000 PDP wells.

Our midstream assets enhance the value of our properties by allowing us to optimize pricing, increase flow assurance and eliminate third-party costs and inefficiencies. In addition, our owned midstream systems generate third-party revenue.
Our third-party midstream service providers are under no obligation to renegotiate their contracts with us.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditure budget for 2026 set between $315 million and $360 million
catalysts.sentence: We spent approximately $251.9 million in 2025 on development costs and our budget for 2026 is between $315.0 million and $360.0 million.
